scenes.text:
It does not matter how many times you fall.
It matters how many times you get back up.

The Japanese proverb says fall seven times, stand up eight. That is the entire formula for success. Not perfection. Not avoiding failure. Just getting back
up one more time than you fall. Every comeback starts with the decision to not stay down. That decision is always available to you.

Nobody remembers how many times you fell. They remember that you kept standing. Your resilience
is the most inspiring thing about you. Not your wins. Your refusal to quit.

You are not defined by your falls.
You are defined by your rises.

What is your comeback story? Drop
it below. Follow for never-quit energy.
